articles.title: 'More advanced' farming women married hunter-gatherer men in Europe thousands of years ago, ancient DNA reveals - Live Science

articles.content: When ancient DNA studies began to gain attention, little more than a decade ago, the view took hold among geneticists that everything we thought we knew about the peopling of Europe by modern humans … [+7168 chars]
